steps.title: Represent the missing samples
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the number of additional samples. The geologist already has $69$ samples and needs at least $74$ samples, so
$$69+x\ge 74$$

steps.title: Find the minimum amount
steps.content:
Subtract $69$ from both sides:
$$x\ge 74-69$$
$$x\ge 5$$
The minimum number of additional samples is $5$. The answer is C.
